query: What renewable energy targets has the UAE committed to under its Net Zero 2050 strategy?
cypher_query: MATCH (c:Country {country_id: $country_id})-[:HAS_POLICY]->(p:Policy)-[:SETS_TARGET]->(t:Target) OPTIONAL MATCH (d:Document)-[:DISCUSSES_POLICY]->(p) RETURN c.name AS country, p.name AS policy, t.name AS target, d.title AS source_doc, d.year AS doc_year ORDER BY policy, target, doc_year DESC
chunk_ids: uae_netzero_chunk_003; uae_netzero_chunk_007; calvin_2023_chunk_012; alam_2020_chunk_005; balcombe_2019_chunk_002; hybrid_bm25_chunk_041; hybrid_dense_chunk_018; hybrid_rrf_chunk_009
answer_quality_notes: Graph-guided: 5 graph chunks, 3 hybrid chunks, 4 page citations resolved. Overlap: 12%. Graph path UAE → Net Zero by 2050 → Triple Renewables by 2030 anchor correctly resolved to UAE strategy document pages 12 and 14. High confidence. Graph adds non-overlapping evidence not in hybrid top-5.

query: Which technologies mitigate heatwave risk in the energy sector according to climate literature?
cypher_query: MATCH (tech:Technology) WHERE $tech_id IS NULL OR tech.tech_id = $tech_id OPTIONAL MATCH (tech)-[m:MITIGATES]->(risk:ClimateRisk) OPTIONAL MATCH (risk)-[:IMPACTS]->(sector:Sector) OPTIONAL MATCH (d:Document {doc_id: m.doc_id}) RETURN tech.name AS technology, risk.name AS mitigated_risk, m.confidence AS mitigation_confidence, sector.name AS applicable_sector, m.evidence_page AS evidence_page, d.title AS source_doc, d.year AS source_year ORDER BY technology, mitigated_risk
graph_hits: solar_pv_node; green_hydrogen_node; wind_power_node; ccs_node; alam_2020; balsalobre_2017
chunk_ids: solar_pv_chunk_001; green_h2_chunk_004; wind_chunk_002; alam_2020_chunk_011; chu_2016_chunk_003; hybrid_rrf_chunk_007; hybrid_rrf_chunk_019
answer_quality_notes: Graph-guided: 6 graph chunks, 2 hybrid chunks, 4 page citations. Technology → MITIGATES → ClimateRisk traversal returned Solar PV, Green Hydrogen, Wind Power nodes all linked to heatwave mitigation. Confidence: medium-high. Graph provides structured evidence chain not reproducible by vector search alone.

query: What climate risks in the MENA region are documented in high-confidence findings?
cypher_query: MATCH (region:Region {region_id: $region_id})<-[:LOCATED_IN]-(country:Country) OPTIONAL MATCH (country)-[:HAS_POLICY]->(policy:Policy) OPTIONAL MATCH (risk:ClimateRisk)-[occurs:OCCURS_IN]->(region) OPTIONAL MATCH (risk)-[impact:IMPACTS]->(sector:Sector) OPTIONAL MATCH (d:Document {doc_id: coalesce(occurs.doc_id, impact.doc_id)}) RETURN region.name AS region, risk.name AS climate_risk, sector.name AS impacted_sector, occurs.confidence AS risk_occurrence_confidence, country.name AS country, policy.name AS relevant_policy, coalesce(occurs.evidence_page, impact.evidence_page) AS evidence_page, d.title AS source_doc ORDER BY climate_risk, impacted_sector, relevant_policy
chunk_ids: finding_chunk_heatwave_p5; finding_chunk_seaLevel_p8; finding_chunk_drought_p3; calvin_2023_chunk_002; altieri_2015_chunk_007; hybrid_rrf_chunk_011; hybrid_rrf_chunk_024
answer_quality_notes: Graph-guided: 4 graph chunks from Finding nodes with page anchors, 3 hybrid chunks. Region traversal (MENA → countries → risks) correctly identified Heatwaves, Water Scarcity, and Coastal Flooding. All Finding nodes had non-null page numbers. Citation cascade used Finding.page directly. Answer is strongly grounded.

query: List all policies adopted by countries in the Pacific Islands for coastal flooding.
cypher_query: MATCH (c:Country {country_id: $country_id})-[:HAS_POLICY]->(p:Policy)-[:SETS_TARGET]->(t:Target) OPTIONAL MATCH (d:Document)-[:DISCUSSES_POLICY]->(p) RETURN c.name AS country, p.name AS policy, t.name AS target, d.title AS source_doc, d.year AS doc_year ORDER BY policy, target, doc_year DESC
graph_hits: (empty — country_id could not be resolved; Pacific Islands is not in COUNTRY_IDS alias table; Cypher returned 0 rows)
answer_quality_notes: FAILURE: Wrong graph entity selected. LLM classifier extracted country_id='pacific_islands' but the graph uses ISO alpha-3 codes. Pacific Islands is not a Country node — it is a Region concept. Alias table ENTITY_ALIASES does not include 'pacific islands'. The correct query template should have been graphrag_region_climate_risk with region_id='pacific_islands', but even that region may not exist in the graph if the corpus has limited Pacific coverage. Hybrid returned tangentially related COP documents. Fix: expand alias table; add region-based fallback when country_id resolution fails.

query: How much has global mean temperature risen since pre-industrial times?
cypher_query: MATCH (f:Finding)-[:SUPPORTED_BY]->(d:Document) OPTIONAL MATCH (f)-[:EVIDENCES_RISK]->(risk:ClimateRisk) WHERE ($risk_id IS NULL OR risk.risk_id = $risk_id) RETURN f.text AS evidence_text, f.page AS page, f.confidence AS confidence, f.qdrant_chunk_id AS qdrant_chunk_id, d.doc_id AS doc_id, d.year AS doc_year ORDER BY f.confidence_rank DESC, d.year DESC
chunk_ids: ipcc_chunk_004; ipcc_chunk_006; calvin_2023_chunk_001; hybrid_rrf_chunk_002; hybrid_rrf_chunk_007; hybrid_dense_chunk_003
answer_quality_notes: FAILURE: Graph expansion too broad. graphrag_finding_document_grounding with risk_id=None (no risk entity in query) returned 50 Finding nodes before ranking. After top-5 ranking, 3 graph chunks were retrieved — all from IPCC AR6. However, 3 of 5 blended chunks were near-duplicates of each other (Jaccard overlap > 0.65) because multiple Finding nodes pointed to the same IPCC pages. MMR re-ranking reduced but did not eliminate redundancy. Answer was correctly grounded but used 3 context slots for near-identical content. Fix: add doc_id-level deduplication before expansion (at most 2 chunks per document); tighten risk_id extraction to prevent null parameter queries from over-expanding.
